ttl.name: YAW RATE AND ACCELERATION SENSOR (w/ VSC)

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT YAW RATE AND ACCELERATION SENSOR

s2.ptxt: Inspect the yaw rate sensor. If any of the following occurs, replace the yaw rate sensor with a new one:

item.ptxt: The surface of the yaw rate sensor is cracked, dented, or chipped off.
The connector is scratched, cracked, or damaged.
The yaw rate sensor has been dropped.
